3015520.name: Woohoo! - Game "Crazy Ball"
3015520.description:
Crazy Ball is a game where you shoot the ball into the table and try to get as many points as you can without letting the ball get pass the fins. You get points by hitting the blue targets with the ball or by getting the ball into special paths. When the ball comes towards the bottom fins, move the fins to knock the ball upward into the table.

When you buy and install this DLC, the mini-game will appear on the main menu as an option in the games list.
Click or touch the game in the games list to start a new game.

Touchscreen Support

Woohoo! - Game "Crazy Ball" supports touchscreens. You can also use a stylus pen or your finger to shoot the ball and move the fins.
(Touchscreen-enabled laptop or tablet required.)
